zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Weare於1645年7月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克時，她的父親Peter Weare26歲，母親Ruth Gooch18歲。她於1667年與Lt. John Drury在美國緬因州約克約克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1675年享年30歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓韋斯特 洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Weare于1645年7月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克时，她的父亲Peter Weare26岁，母亲Ruth Gooch18岁。她于1667年与Lt. John Drury在美国缅因州約克約克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1675年享年30岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓韋斯特 洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Weare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wear   or   Ware  .

variants.name: Wear
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by the Wear river in northeastern England. The river name is ancient, occuring in the form Vedra in Ptolemy's Geographia; it is probably from a Celtic word meaning ‘water’.
topographic name for someone who lived near a dam or weir, a variant of Ware 1, or a habitational name from a place called Weare, in Devon and Somerset, from Old English wær, wer ‘weir’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Weare was born on 28 July 1645, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, her father, Peter Weare, was 26 and her mother, Ruth Gooch, was 18. She married Lt. John Drury in 1667, in York, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1675, at the age of 30, and was buried in West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Weare est née le 28 juillet 1645, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Peter Weare, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ruth Gooch, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Lt. John Drury en 1667, à York, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1675, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Weare am 28. Juli 1645 in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Weare 26 und ihre Mutter Ruth Gooch 18. Sie hat 1667 in York, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Lt. John Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1675 im Alter von 30 Jahren und wurde in West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Weare è nata il il 28 luglio 1645 nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, sua padre, Peter Weare, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Ruth Gooch, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Lt. John Drury nel 1667, nel York, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1675, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Weareが1645年7月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで生まれた時，父Peter Weareは26歳，母Ruth Goochは18歳であった。1667年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークヨークでLt. John Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1675年に30歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンウエスト ロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Weare(이)가 1645년 7월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Weare(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ruth Gooch(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1667년 미국 메인 주 요르크 요르크에서 Lt. John Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 웨스트 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Weare nasceu em 28 de julho de 1645, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, seu pai, Peter Weare, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ruth Gooch, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Lt. John Drury em 1667, em York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1675, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Weare родилась 28 июля 1645 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Peter Weare было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ruth Gooch, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lt. John Drury в 1667 г. в местности ерк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1675 г. в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности вест роксбури, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Weare nació el 28 de julio de 1645, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, su papá, Peter Weare, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ruth Gooch, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lt. John Drury en 1667, en York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1675, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en West Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
